title: Halfway Done
excerpt: Is time flying like crazy for everyone? More than halfway done with this year, which means I have taken over 183 photos and kept up with photo-a-day. Here is the tutorial on how I made the collage . Just under…
body: Is time flying like crazy for everyone? More than halfway done with this year, which means I have taken over 183 photos and kept up with photo-a-day. Here is the tutorial on how I made the collage. Just under 6 more months to go. Although I am enjoying the moments and ridiculously fast days, I am wishing there was a pause button. Especially since June gloom is finally behind us. Friendly reminder that Persnickety Prints free shipping code expires tomorrow.
